headline: APA (APA) Stock Looks Cheap Relative To Its Earnings Power
summary: APA stock has logged a 127.5% return over the past five years, and the current valuation checks still point to it screening cheap rather than stretched. That combination of a strong long run and a positive valuation read is drawing attention to whether the recent share price now fully reflects the risks and opportunities around the business. Over five years, APA has returned 127.5%, which puts the current share price in the spotlight as investors assess how much of the story is already...

headline: How APA’s Completed Buyback and Strait of Hormuz Risks At APA (APA) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In the quarter ended June 30, 2026, APA completed a long-running share repurchase program launched in 2018, cumulatively buying back about 100.93 million shares for roughly US$3.31 billion, including 2.8 million shares for US$98.7 million in the most recent tranche. These buybacks, alongside recent insider selling and sector-wide sensitivity to geopolitical tensions in the Strait of Hormuz, highlight how capital returns, management behavior, and external oil supply risks are all influencing...

headline: APA (APA) Could Be 18% Below Fair Value After Strait Of Hormuz Tensions
summary: APA (APA) moved after heightened U.S. military action against Iranian targets and a new 20% fee on cargo through the Strait of Hormuz, as investors reassessed oil supply risk and producer revenue exposure. See our latest analysis for APA. APA’s share price has been choppy in recent months, with a 30 day share price return down 6.73% and a 90 day share price return down 5.66%. However, its year to date share price return of 36.16% and 1 year total shareholder return of 92.86% point to strong...

headline: APA (APA) Stock Gets Fair Value Trim As Analysts Weigh Oil Upside And Risks
summary: APA's fair value price target has been updated to US$42.13 from US$43.24, reflecting a small reset in the modeled intrinsic value of the stock. This shift comes as analysts weigh upside linked to APA's oil exposure and exploration projects against commodity sensitivity and execution risks, which is showing up in a wide spread of ratings and targets. Read on to see how these moving pieces fit together and how you can track the evolving analyst narrative around APA. Analyst Price Targets don't...
